name: My Bride is a Mermaid
overview: Nagasumi's in hot water after a beautiful, young mermaid named Sun saves him from drowning. The deep-sea sweetheart's dad is a merman yakuza prone to executing anyone who learns his family's scaly secret! Luckily, there's a catch - if Nagasumi agrees to marry Sun, he just might avoid sleeping with the fishes!

trailers.title: My Bride is a Mermaid - Part 1 on DVD 7/20/10 - Anime Trailer
